description: Job Description: 1. Enhance the security, programming logic, and business programming of the Android POS application for over 350 stores. 2. Build a new digital kiosk application and drive-thru self-service (becoming the first drive-thru in Indonesia with in-app self-payment). 3. Build a new QR code order application. 4. Revamp the customer feedback application with dynamic questions and surveys. 5. Enhance the new counter and customer display applications. 6. Create API integration between the data store and the data center. 7. Create payment gateway integration. 8. Develop middleware in coordination with the team for food delivery integration (HokBen x GoFood & GrabFood). 9. Improve API integration between applications. 10. Lead Team to work on several application projects.

Job Description: 1. Revamp UI/UX and add modules to the Sales Force Automation application. 2. Optimize the Web Report Dashboard to ensure more stable dashboard reporting. 3. Coordinate with the team (junior developers) to create a new CSA Driver System project.

Job Description: 1. Fixing programming bugs. 2. Working on requests to enhance the Transportation Management System application, from a financial perspective and for other users. 3. Collaborating with other developers to revamp the Company Profile website from .Net Core to PHP CodeIgniter. 4. Collaborating with other developers to revamp the Transportation Management System application from .Net Core to PHP CodeIgniter.
